notable_excerpts: We are setting up the manufacturing for electrolyzers, which is TAC, BOS, and BOP. This will be the alkaline technology that we are progressing with.
We are planning a fully integrated green chemicals ecosystem powered to green hydrogen and then converting into green chemicals.
We are setting up this at world leading scale, full integration which provides highest efficiency solar panels, ESS batteries, which further reduces the cost.
We are setting up skilling schools for operating these models.

For us, new energy is effectively our next growth engine for Reliance. One of the key reasons for us to get into new energy is obviously to provide the energy security at affordable cost for our entire group's captive requirements.
The whole idea is to say why it is self-funding and how we will de-risk by getting in investors, both of the financial side and on the take or pay.
So, there is no more tax to be paid on this amount that is the point I wanted to highlight.

chain_of_thought: Reliance's earnings call highlighted significant environmental initiatives, particularly in renewable energy and green chemicals, with a strong focus on integrated energy solutions. Social aspects were less emphasized but included community energy security and employee training. Governance disclosures were moderate, focusing on risk management and financial transparency.
strengths: Integration of green hydrogen and chemicals
